overall.description: A stationary third-person view from a fantasy RPG game showing a character cooking at a fire inside a rustic cave dwelling. The scene is illuminated by warm firelight and candles, with stone walls and wooden furnishings visible throughout the clip.

agents.ego_description: standing at the cooking fire and stirring the contents of a pot

entered.detail: burning fire with visible flames and embers providing warm orange illumination
rough dark stone cave wall forming the back of the dwelling
wooden shelving unit holding various items and containers
decorative holder made of animal horns with three lit candles
black iron pot suspended over the fire on a metal stand

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary, focused on a cooking scene inside a cozy cave dwelling. The player character stands at a burning fire, stirring a pot while warm firelight flickers against the stone walls. To the right, a horn-shaped candle holder with three flames adds to the ambient lighting, and wooden shelves line the left side of the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, intimate focus on a cozy cooking scene within a rustic cave dwelling. It begins with the camera centered on a player character who stands over a burning fire, stirring a pot as the flames cast a flickering glow across the surrounding stone walls. As the light dances, the view encompasses the warm ambient illumination provided by a horn-shaped candle holder with three flames to the right. The scene then settles into the quiet atmosphere of the dwelling, revealing wooden shelves lining the left side of the space.
